summary: The text contains cryptic instructions involving symbolic letters, geometric figures, and references to historical figures like Agathon Tragicus and Theodectes Phaelites, suggesting encoded methods tied to natural signs and occult symbolism.

entities.name: Agathon Tragicus
entities.description: Illiterate figure mentioned as describing a phenomenon in Telepho
entities.quote: The same Agathon Tragicus in Telepho, illiterate, was describing some phenomenon.

entities.name: Theodectes Phaelites
entities.description: Individual associated with the name given to a described rustic method
entities.quote: The same name was given to Theodectes Phaelites, who described rusticum.

entities.name: cipher_method
entities.description: Symbolic system using lines, circles, and geometric forms derived from nature
entities.quote: Two lines drawn from the same point converged at both feet... A sixth-pointed arc, clementine of the third kind

entities.name: material
entities.description: Hidden or concealed things are central to the method
entities.quote: Let us conceal the hidden things.

entities.name: geometric_figure
entities.description: Circle with a middle sign, described as umbilicated and containing rules
entities.quote: The primordial scripture is umbilicated in the middle circle

entities.name: Trinity
entities.description: Threefold structure emerging from a central arc, linked to divine elements
entities.quote: From it emerge two coccinellids... A trinity in obligation, shining

entities.name: coccinellids
entities.description: Two ladybug-like symbols emerging from the trinity

entities.name: Leonardo Veronensis
entities.description: Friend associated with liberalitas and benevolence
entities.quote: liberalitas of Leonardo Veronensis our intimate friend

entities.name: Mariam
entities.description: Divine mother figure, nourisher and resource in occult theology
entities.quote: itself our nourisher and mother Mariam

entities.name: Anconius
entities.description: Reverent figure referenced in a prayer-like passage
